environment.reason: Remote server — no microphone hardware, no desktop browser session

what_requires_real_browser.actual_microphone_capture: requires desktop browser with mic permission
what_requires_real_browser.web_speech_api_event_flow: requires Chrome/Edge with speech recognition support
what_requires_real_browser.confidence_score_accuracy: depends on browser speech engine quality

truthful_disclosure: Voice input adapter is fully implemented and type-checked. Real microphone testing requires a desktop browser with mic permissions — this cannot be verified in a headless VPS environment. Text fallback path is fully verified.
